ogTitle: Irvingdale vs Isis River: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Irvingdale and Isis River.
heading: Irvingdale vs Isis River — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Irvingdale, Queensland and Isis River, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Irvingdale has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Isis River (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Irvingdale or Isis River safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Irvingdale has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Isis River scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Irvingdale scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Isis River scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Irvingdale or Isis River?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Irvingdale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
